name: Raspberry Sauce- Master Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine all sauce ingredients except lemon juice. Bring to boil, then boil gently, stirring for about 7 minutes.
2. Reduce heat and stir in lemon juice; keep warm.
3. To garnish the parfait, carefully release the springform ring (if difficult, slightly warm the ring with your palms).
4. Whip 1/2 cup cream until stiff. Form decorative border or rosettes around the top and bottom edge of the parfait by piping whipped cream through a pastry bag fitted with a star tip.
5. Arrange 2 raspberries and 2 or 3 almond slices on top of each serving.
6. Cut into wedges and serve with warm raspberry sauce, if desired.
